ddls:
CREATE TABLE "emission_data" (
  "year_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each year */,
  "emission_range_id" TEXT /* Identifier for the CO2 emission range */,
  "vehicle_count" INTEGER /* Number of vehicles in the specified emission range for the given year */,
  "total_vehicles" INTEGER /* Total number of vehicles for the given year */,
  "data_source_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data source for this emission data */,
  "data_collection_date" TEXT /* Date when the emission data was collected */,
  "data_version" TEXT /* Version of the emission data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("year_id", "emission_range_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_emission_data_data_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_source_id") REFERENCES data_sources ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "years" (
  "year_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each year */,
  "year_name" INTEGER /* Year for which data is recorded */,
  "average_co2_emission" REAL /* Average CO2 emission (g/km) for the given year */,
  "total_vehiclesRegistered" INTEGER /* Total number of vehicles registered for the given year */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* ID of the country for which this year's data is recorded */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("year_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_years_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "emission_ranges" (
  "emission_range_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each emission range */,
  "range_name" TEXT /* Name of the emission range */,
  "range_start" REAL /* Start value of the emission range (g/km) */,
  "range_end" REAL /* End value of the emission range (g/km) */,
  "emission_range_description" TEXT /* Description of the emission range */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("emission_range_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data source */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the data source (e.g., Government Agency, Manufacturer) */,
  "source_description" TEXT /* Description of the data source */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the source */,
  "data_format" TEXT /* Format of the data provided by the source (e.g., CSV, JSON) */,
  "update_frequency" TEXT /* Frequency at which the source updates its data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, policymaker, admin) */,
  "organization" TEXT /* Organization to which the user belongs */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department within the organization */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "year_id" INTEGER /* ID of the year for which data was accessed */,
  "emission_range_id" TEXT /* ID of the emission range for which data was accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "query_parameters" TEXT /* Query parameters used to filter the data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_emission_range_id FOREIGN KEY ("emission_range_id") REFERENCES emission_ranges ("emission_range_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_year_id FOREIGN KEY ("year_id") REFERENCES years ("year_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "countries" (
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each country */,
  "country_name" TEXT /* Name of the country */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region to which the country belongs */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "emission_data_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "year_id" INTEGER /* ID of the year for which this version applies */,
  "emission_range_id" TEXT /* ID of the emission range for which this version applies */,
  "version_date" TEXT /* Date when this version was created */,
  "version_description" TEXT /* Description of the changes in this version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_emission_data_versions_emission_range_id FOREIGN KEY ("emission_range_id") REFERENCES emission_ranges ("emission_range_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_emission_data_versions_year_id FOREIGN KEY ("year_id") REFERENCES years ("year_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user to whom this permission applies */,
  "permission_name" TEXT /* Name of the permission (e.g., view_data, download_data) */,
  "permission_description" TEXT /* Description of the permission */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_permissions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_collections" (
  "collection_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data collection */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* ID of the source from which data was collected */,
  "collection_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was collected */,
  "collection_description" TEXT /* Description of the data collection */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("collection_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_collections_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("source_id") REFERENCES data_sources ("source_id")
)
